problem_statement: The selected read-only worker path has a dry-run emitter envelope and runner-binding witness, but it lacks a schema-backed candidate for the future runtime receipt envelope that records required UAO, Phi_gov, temporal lease, failure receipt, and effect reconciliation refs while keeping live runtime authority blocked.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeReceiptCandidate validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the candidate binds the runner binding witness, emitter dry-run, handoff, binding, lease preflight, and rehearsal evidence
runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed

the future runtime receipt envelope requires UAO, Phi_gov, causal trace, temporal lease, runner registration witness, schema binding witness, failure receipt, effect reconciliation, and receipt store refs
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing refs, execution drift, failure-policy drift, admission drift, receipt-ref drift, count drift, and terminal-closure drift
non_goals: no launch, production, customer, or support readiness claim
constraints: runtime receipt schema binding remains unperformed
future runtime admission must still require temporal lease evidence, UAO, Phi_gov, recovery evidence, and verification
WorkerFailureReceipt remains mandatory for failed or partial dispatch evidence
raw output retention remains denied and only output digests may be carried
Mfidel atomicity remains preserved and no text-processing decomposition is introduced
evidence_required: focused pytest receipt for candidate behavior
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
